title: Pavilion Gift Company - Cherished Beyond Measure - 6-inch Stackable Ceramic Kitchen Measuring Cup (¼, ⅓, ½, 1 Cup), Rustic, Antique, Farmhouse Design For Kitchen, Mason Jar Measuring Cup, Cream
description:
About this item
PREMIUM QUALITY: 6" tall x 3.5" round ceramic measuring cup set is stackable for neat storage. Comes in 4 parts - 1/4 cup, 1/3 cup, 1/2 cup & 1 cup.
IN-HOUSE DESIGN: The top 1/4 cup has a teal lid, the 1/3 cup has a butterfly, and the very top of the pink, purple, and orange flowers stemming through the 1/2 cup & 1 cup. In addition, the 1/2 cup has a "You Are Cherished" sentiment, whereas the 1 cup has "Beyond Measure." Finally, the interior of each piece has lines and text for measuring purposes.
PERFECT GIFT: Moms love delicious baking snacks for the whole family to treasure and share. So surprise her with this beautiful mason jar set. She'll love her newest addition to her spring bright floral kitchen, designed by our team to fit perfectly into any mama's home. Fabulous Mother's Day present from the kids.
CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Dishwasher safe. NOT microwave safe due to real silver metal text. Packaged safely in a die-cut box.
MORE PRODUCTS: We have hundreds of gifts for grandmothers. Be sure to visit our storefront to check out everything we offer in this style and many more.
